description:
Rewrite templates/default/flake.nix:

- Drop teller + toolbox from inputs (no longer needed).
- Drop the 'registry = { buck2 = pkgs.buck2; nix = pkgs.nix; ... }' flat-attrset fallback. The module defaults now provide the versioned registry, so consumers get buck2/nix/etc. via toolchain.toml without listing them in registry.
- Keep registryExtensions for any genuinely project-specific tools (the comment showing the example is fine).
- Reduce the perSystem block to ~10 lines focused on turnkey.toolchains + buck2.

Verify: 'nix flake new -t github:firefly-engineering/turnkey/<branch> demo' (or equivalent local invocation) produces a flake that 'nix flake check' validates and 'nix develop' enters cleanly.
title: Update template to use module defaults + versioned registry
